_comment: Hooks for vue-plugin. PostToolUse: format and lint changed Vue/TS/JS files via ESLint + Prettier when present. Skips silently when not configured.

hooks.command: f="$CLAUDE_FILE"; case "$f" in *.vue|*.tsx|*.ts|*.jsx|*.js|*.mts|*.cts|*.mjs|*.cjs) [ -f package.json ] && grep -q '"prettier"' package.json 2>/dev/null && npx --no-install prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; [ -f package.json ] && grep -q '"eslint"' package.json 2>/dev/null && npx --no-install eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null; exit 0;; esac
